startPoint.en: Talk to Pikkupstix in his house in Taverley.
startPoint.es: Habla con Pikkupstix en su casa en Taverley.

rewards.name: Troll cave
rewards.display: Access to the troll cave with mountain trolls in it

text.en: Talk to Pikkupstix in his summoning shop just north-west of Taverley's east entrance.
text.es: Habla con Pikkupstix en su tienda de invocación, justo al noroeste de la entrada este de Taverley.

chatOptions: 2 Do you have a quest for me?

text.en: Head to south of the Taverley lodestone, enter the well, and watch the short cutscene.
text.es: Dirígete al sur de la piedra de viaje de Taverley, entra en el pozo y observa la breve escena.

chatOptions: 1 Look, I'll just go and take a look myself...

text.en: Talk to Pikkupstix back at the east side of Taverley.
text.es: Habla con Pikkupstix de nuevo en el lado este de Taverley.

chatOptions: 2 Bowloftrix has been kidnapped by trolls!
5 I think I had better go.

text.en: Go upstairs at Pikkupstix's house and search the cluttered drawers in the north-west corner.
text.es: Sube las escaleras en la casa de Pikkupstix y registra los cajones desordenados en la esquina noroeste.

text.en: Go to the pet shop south of Pikkupstix and ask the owner about white hare meat.
text.es: Ve a la tienda de mascotas al sur de Pikkupstix y pregúntale al dueño sobre la carne de liebre blanca.

chatOptions: 1 Ask about the white hare meat.

text.en: Go back towards the well and go west onto White Wolf Mountain.
text.es: Regresa hacia el pozo y ve al oeste hacia White Wolf Mountain.

text.en: Take the eastern path and search Stikklebrix's body.
text.es: Toma el sendero del este y registra el cuerpo de Stikklebrix.

text.en: Talk to Pikkupstix after the items are obtained.
text.es: Habla con Pikkupstix después de obtener los objetos.

chatOptions: 2 I need to ask you something about the quest...

text.en: Infuse the pouch using the obelisk on the eastern side of his house.
text.es: Infunde la bolsa usando el obelisco en el lado este de su casa.

chatOptions: 2 I need to ask you something about the quest...
1 I made the giant wolpertinger pouch!

text.en: Go west back to the well and talk to Scalectrix (make sure you dismiss your pet if you have one out).
text.es: Ve al oeste de vuelta al pozo y habla con Scalectrix (asegúrate de despedir a tu mascota si tienes una fuera).
